summary: A simple 1-2 puzzle game (likely a number/sliding puzzle game).
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Stylized 4x4 tile grid with glowing neon numbered squares on a dark background, arcade-retro style logo (puzzle-logo.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Implement a 1-2 sliding number puzzle game on the frontend. The puzzle is a classic 15-puzzle (4x4 grid with tiles numbered 1–15 and one empty space). The player slides tiles into the empty space to arrange them in order from 1–15. Features must include: randomized shuffled starting state, move counter, elapsed timer, win detection with congratulations message, a New Game button to restart, and a leaderboard view showing top scores fetched from the backend.

Apply a clean, modern arcade-retro visual theme throughout the app. Use a dark background with vibrant neon tile colors, bold pixel-style or monospace typography, subtle glowing effects on interactive tiles, and smooth CSS transitions for tile slides. The layout should be centered, minimal, and focused on the puzzle grid.
Generate and render a custom logo image for the game header — a stylized tile grid icon with glowing number tiles.

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement a sliding puzzle game backend that stores player scores and best moves. The backend should expose functions to: save a completed puzzle score (playerName, moveCount, timeInSeconds), retrieve the top 10 leaderboard entries sorted by fewest moves, and reset/clear leaderboard entries.
